title: Stretch image
author: aparzi
body:
I have merged cells, going to create a cell of this size:
628px wide
583px tall

The image to add in this cell has the following dimensions: 615px width and 336px height. The result is a stretched image, what am I doing wrong? I add the image via base64.

Library version: "^4.3.0",

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @aparzi Can you provide some code examples and screenshots of the results in excel?
